description: Items from mundane_weapons bucket — open-compatible metadata and original summaries.

mastery.description: On hit, target's speed reduced by 10 ft until start of your next turn.
When using the Light property extra attack, draw a second weapon without bonus action.
On hit, push target up to 10 ft directly away if Large or smaller.
On hit, your next attack roll against the target before end of your next turn has advantage.
On hit, target's speed reduced by 10 ft until start of your next turn.
When using the Light property extra attack, draw a second weapon without bonus action.
On hit, target has disadvantage on its next attack roll before your next turn.
On hit, target must DC 8+prof+ability Strength save or be knocked prone.
When using the Light property extra attack, draw a second weapon without bonus action.

On hit, target must DC 8+prof+ability Strength save or be knocked prone.
On hit, target has disadvantage on its next attack roll before your next turn.
On miss, deal ability modifier damage (min 1) of the weapon's type.
On hit, attack another creature within reach, dealing 1[W] of same type (no ability mod).
